completed_tasks.name: Write tests for solarTerm-first priority and canonical festivals (RED phase)
Implement solarTerm-first priority, canonical festival map, 除夕 detection, leap month (GREEN phase)

human_actions_pending.action: Visual check: Navigate calendar to late July 2025 and verify toolbar shows '闰六月'
human_actions_pending.context: Automated test date doesn't trigger leap month path. The isLeap branch is implemented but untested at runtime.

decisions.rationale: Solar terms like 清明 should never be hidden by festival entries on same/nearby dates

decisions.decision: 9 canonical festivals only via CANONICAL_FESTIVALS map
decisions.rationale: getLunarFestivals() returns 50+ obscure folk festivals (犬日, 猪日, etc.) that clutter the calendar

decisions.decision: Dynamic 除夕 detection via next-day check
decisions.rationale: 12th lunar month can be 29 or 30 days; checking if next day is 正月初一 handles both cases

next_action: User decides: say 'approved' to mark phase complete, or report issues for gap closure. Then commit uncommitted ROADMAP.md and STATE.md updates.
